title: micrangelia pyrenaea
intro: Micrangelia pyrenaea, also known as Pyrenean angelica, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Micrangelia pyrenaea include its ability to ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Micrangelia pyrenaea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate digestive issues.
